issues.description: Effect is incomplete. DSL only implements the FlipLife action but omits the conditional protection effect. The card grants immunity to K.O. in battle for Characters with cost ≤7 during this turn, which requires a GiveKeyword action with duration DuringYourTurn or a custom protection mechanic.
Missing condition to filter target Characters by cost (cost ≤7). DSL lacks ability to express cost-based targeting.
FlipLife action is optional per card text ('You may add 1 card...'), but DSL does not express optionality. Should be conditional or marked as optional:true.
